review_text: Beautiful tranquil off season holiday. Comfy beds and all basic necessities provided

Excellent service. Very helpful and friendly. Tidy and very clean amenities.great affordable price. Down the back is like youre in the bush so quiet and peaceful. Lots of birds especially kookies. Great location you are right there in Tuncurry but it feels like youre miles away from busy busy. All the clubs and pubs couresty bus picks up at front of park. We have been here 3 or 4 times and will be back again.
Beautiful and peaceful nice clean amenities definitely coming again

Such a great little park doesn't have all the frills like the huge parks but thats what makes it able to keep prices down.the camp area is amazing like a rain forest with heaps of birdlife 🐦 🐦‍⬛ location is awesome nice & quite & only 5mins from everything you need.Staff are friendly & always willing to help if you need it
The beautiful time
Amazing caravan experience. Most defiantly will be coming again, beautifully kept amenities and very clean
Stayed there recently and had an amazing experience. The cabins are always well maintained and staff are very friendly.
Very nicely cleaned cabins and lovely pool for my children. Friendly staff too, would highly recommend

I am  a local & have been here for 2&1/2yrs now& i actually deliver to this holiday park i just wanted to say in the begining i thought great location but the place looked really out dated &non appealing considering the gorgeous area it caters for,but in the last 12months its looking more&more welcoming& cleaned up &professionally run,The manager Fiona Weston has done a fantastic job in making it run like a business & maintaining that polite but professional approach in keeping the park the way it should be.the lovely lady Belinda who multi tasks between cleaning& fill in office work is also a credit to this business,its people like this who take pride in there work&do there jobs well that keep your company going,so please look after these employees& keep them as again they are a great asset to this business.

The rooms are great and the beds are quite comfortable, the WiFi showed a guest WiFi but when you try to connect it disappears and there's no advertised WiFi password in the cabins. The place itself is beautiful with a lovely pool on site. But located up against residentials which personalty i would prefer to be a little secluded. But that's just me. It was a lovely stay with beautiful friendly staff.

Yesterday I called to enquire about a parcel of mine that had gone missing in the post only to find that my parcel had accidently been delivered to the caravan park 2 weeks earlier and the office girls made no attempt to return my parcel to Australia Post.
When I stated my concern I was told they were too busy to take the parcel back  I enquired why didn't you give to the Postie when he came and the replied that he wouldn't take the parcel back.
These girls had answer for everything.
I left , drove to the Post Office and filed a complaint.
The girls were not being truthful.
They also were holding some other innocent unsuspecting person's parcel.
Very clean good value Central to town quiet area felt secure
Great location childrens park needs updates Toilets and showers are clean pool is a great size the park also Doesn't have a jumping Pillow overall the park needs an update and alot of love
Friendly staff. Close to pubs shopping centre. Good facility.
Good holiday park, great location and lovely for kids. Had a weird water pipe over our pool view room which made noises all night long but other than that pleasant stay.
Nice shady area at the back but very overpriced especially as not holiday season. Amenities at the bottom not cleaned while we were there.
Quiet & clean  cabins
Excellent sport nice and quiet

No reception..

Very poor!

Great place but service is poor and the reception guy is rather impolite. He does his job but doesn't have any patience for hospitality. You don't feel you are welcomed here compared to other holiday parks. Would not recommend for a family trip.
Friendly staff, good amenities, beautiful park

Don’t bother !

The park is disgusting and the manager is horrible ! No customer service.
Love the park The owners are awesome  extremely helpful kind and wonderful
Peaceful, quiet environment, management are awesome. Did not rate rooms as i am thinking if buying there for holidays.

Park is very run down , we were there for over a week and the amenities near us were not cleaned, bins are overflowing with blow flies all around it. It is apparently been taken over by Big 4 so hopefully they will upgrade it. Very hard to find anyone in the office so couldn’t ask for ammenities to be cleaned very disappointed
Friendly staff, and great pool. We had such a lovely time. Thankyou!!

Absoulty disappointed booked for 3 day and they came told us on the 2nd day we only booked for 2 even after previous conversations with the to receptions and what our plans with family visiting on that day.spoke with other stayers as well that were leaving and they done the same thing to them as well.They are not friendly poor attitude rooms were not well maintained with water leak marks on the roof the villa was not what we booked pool has a green ring around it full of leaves falling from the trees no shade at all over the pool and not very unorganized and a big disappointment.told if we what to stay we had to pay and extra night (NO THANKS) when approached the reception about it got attitude and and yelled at to leave.not family friendly at all.

My first time here and we stayed at the Twin dolphins knowing nothing's except its in Tuncurry and the staff are friendly and answer calls promptly. It was a fabulous experience, so close to the shoos, the beach, the rockpool, Lovely friendly staff, the Kookooburra cabin we stayed in was lovely, near and clean with all the amenities we needed. The pool was lovely..very good for kids and the outdoor BBQ are was simply superb we had so many group BBQ and breakfasts there. We had thr best time, will definitely come back

We had our tent and camped in  for the weekend just recently was very relaxing and peaceful with the rain forest surrounding us. It's dog friendly as well kids playground was awesome my 5 yr old loved it has a great BBQ and pool area. Short drive to tuncurry Rock pools or shops friendly staff as well we also had a game of pool and a hockey table you do have to pay 2 dollars each game for both game tables but overall experience was great would go bk for sure thanks again to the staff 😀

I had so much fun here but there was this lady and i picked her flowers and i didnt know it was hers (i thought it was for the holiday park) and she screams and chases me. I was traumatised imagine if she done that to a kid

We loved the camp site. It was beautiful,  there were lots of trees and birds and the sites weren't on top of each other. The ablutions were clean and the water pressure in the showers were great. We had a brilliant long weekend and we will definitely be back.
Excellent spot, nice and quiet, very clean and well equipped. Awesome staff also. Thanks 🙂

This is a pleasant enough place, however it's located away from the water and walks. There are two Reflections caravan parks in this area one on the Tuncurry side within steps away from the sought after Tuncurry Rock Pool. The other Reflections is on the Forster side also close to the water with fantastic views of the Marina and sunsets to die for. If you can get into either of these two you would be much, much better off. This park wanted full payment from us to secure our booking for the week leading to and including the new year 2024. We booked this and paid the money months before the stay. I got very sick whilst in QLD and had caravan issues which set us back a few weeks. Despite lots of notice the management wouldn't refund us the money, they held it in credit. Long story short we did stay on our way south not for the original week we booked but two weeks to try and use up the credit. Our rate for the two weeks was $58 per night when the rate for the period we stayed in there February/ March was $48 per night. We were forced to pay this to use up as much of our credit as we could. We were still about $160 dollars in credit, guess what management would not refund the balance. We could not stay any longer to use it up. We are pensioners, this is a lot of money to us. I learnt two lessons from this establishment, one never evey pay a Park in full again, always only leave a deposit and if they insist on full payment in advance go somewhere else. We will  never ever stay here again. Oh and this Is a Kui Park!! We are members....we were members, will not use or recomend Kui Parks.
An update 12/03/2024. We had another booking under the same arrangement as Twin Dolphins with Mountain View Resort Shoalhaven ( G'Day) Park. Because we were meant to stay here in peak season we were also asked to secured the site by paying in full. When we were forced to cancel our booking Mountain View held our money in credit to be used with the park or any other G'day Park of our choice, quite acceptable. we arrived here  at Mountain View Resort to day. You know what after putting our credit towards our 7 night stay we were still in credit by $81 dollars. With no prompting from me the receptionist transferred the $81 to my account there and then.
That is doing the right thing.
This further emphasises what poor attitude and lack of respect Twin Dolphins management has towards thier Guests, coupled with being rude , arrogant and greedy.
I cannot recomend this place when there are so much better choices of Caravan parks In Forster-Tuncurry.

Clean modern amenities. Efficiently managed. Has a beautiful, private, tropical, landscaped pool.
Dont camp near the cabbage palm forest -!! sandflies and mossies.
Went there for a short holiday
Very quiet nice cabin
The biggest mozzie pit  I have ever stayed in.  Damp and hundreds of mozzie s were in the bathroom.

Never Had A Problem
Quite & Well Maintained.
The amenities block have been totally renovated and they are top class. The toilets now have open outward doors creating an easier entry and exit.

Rooms where not clean they had mold all in the shower in the air con vents I have a 4 month old baby couldn't even put him in the shower chair due to mold, also using the air con as didn't want my baby breathing in the mold the rooms where dusty with koney left from previous people and was told rooms are cleaned properly! Spoke to reception on multiple accusion within days of booking they very rude!  Avertise air jump for the kids not in action!  Wouldn't take my family there again! Told kay the owner when leaving about these issue and was very rude!

We were so surprised with how peaceful this place was. Its close to everything. Our cabin was clean and comfortable. The management friendly and accommodating. It was the perfect escape for our family and will definitely come back. Thankyou 😊

Such a lovely, quiet holiday park! Will definitely be staying again. Situated next to a lovely rainforest with lots of kookaburras to see. I also had a large white bird (possibly an owl) on my car when I woke at night! Has anyone else seen this bird here at night? Very cool!
Park too outdated, overpriced,nothing for kids to do apart from pool
gret location nice and quite
A really lovely family owned holiday park. They went above and beyond to help me out during such a busy period. Thank you for having me and will return again!
Wonderful park surrounded by beautiful palms and trees. Pool was awesome. Great place for the family.
Great pool. Good cabin. Met our needs.

Kay was very helpful with our booking process.
Showers are very clean and modern.
Very quiet park except for the huge amount of Kookaburras that were great to listen to.
Nice easy drive to town and Forster
Lovely place to stay wood recommend if you haven't been there definitely try it you will not be disappointed
The grass sights for those who have dogs is  a lovely area with a beautiful rainforest backdrop. The ablushen block is one of the best design. Very clean and great hot water.
A few issues but will return

Om familie te bezoeken hebben we dit parck gekozen. De ligging is aan de bostand. Dus voor het mooie uitzicht hoef je hier niet te komen. Om 4.30 trakteren de kookaburra's je op een mooi consert. Wij vonden dit hilarisch. Complimenten voor het sanitairgebouw. Net nieuw en zeer netjes.

Very quiet park,  caravan sites are big, amenities are clean and sighted in centre of site area. A short drive to Tuncurry and Forster.
Update July 2023
Landed back here as was cheaper than the other parks in area. Staff are friendly and helpful.
Has 3 types of accommodation,  cabins (being progressively refurbished) , slab sites and grass sites. All the grass sites are an easy walk to amenities.
Dolphin Holiday Park is a lovely peaceful trancal place I was visiting.very nice ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
